items: Jacob Misiorowski blanked Colorado for 7.0 innings, striking out 8 in Milwaukee's 7-1 win.
Brice Turang homered 2 times as Milwaukee beat Colorado, 7-1.
Pete Crow-Armstrong homered 2 times as Chicago Cubs beat San Francisco, 3-2.
Cleveland pitching combined to shut out Texas, 6-0.
The Yankees pitching combined to shut out Boston, 0-0.
Seattle pitching combined to shut out Detroit, 4-0.
St. Louis walked off Cincinnati, 6-5 — one of 4 one-run finishes across the league.
